summary: RETEST PASSED. Verified frontend integrity auto-check fix on /reports → 'إغلاق الصندوق' tab. With default 'جميع الفروع' branch and range 2026-06-25 → 2026-07-07, clicking تحديث now auto-populates [data-testid='integrity-results-panel'] with the REAL results: 'فحص السلامة التلقائي: 7 شفت — 5 متطابق ✓ • 2 غير متطابق ⚠' and renders exactly 2 [data-testid^='integrity-mismatch-'] cards (كاشير ب اختبار 2026-07-06 and كاشير اختبار 2026-06-30, both 'لا يوجد سجل إغلاق مطابق لهذا الشفت'). No more false all-clear green 0/0 banner. Bug from iteration_283 is fixed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Integrity auto-check now correctly strips branch_id when 'all' and backend treats 'all/*/empty' as no filter. Verified checked=7, ok=5, mismatch=2 with 2 mismatch cards for range 2026-06-25→2026-07-07. Only 1 tenant branch exists so specific-branch dropdown test only shows 'جميع الفروع' + one branch; switching to the specific branch still triggers the auto-refresh mechanism (URL params correctly include branch_id when non-'all').
rca of the issue: Previously frontend sent branch_id=all as literal string; backend filtered by that string and returned 0 rows, producing false green all-clear. Fix (verified): Reports.js runIntegrityCheck skips appending branch_id when value is 'all'; backend shifts-check treats 'all'/'*'/'' as no filter.
